stemHtml: The main reason for mounting the detector unit of a remote reading compass in the wingtip of an aeroplane is…

options.a: to ensure that the unit is in the most accessible position on the aircraft for ease of maintenance.
options.b: by having detector units on both wingtips, to cancel out the deviation effects caused by the aircraft structure.
options.c: to minimise the influence of the aircraft magnetic field.
options.d: to maximise the units exposure to the earth`s magnetic field.
